events.event_description: First U.S. Consular Agent appointed to Bloemfontein (the capital of the Orange Free State), establishing a consular presence.

evidence.quote: The first U.S. Consul assigned to the Orange Free State was Ernst Richard Landgraf, who was appointed as U.S. Consular Agent to Bloemfontein on December 16, 1891.

events.event_description: The Orange Free State was annexed to the British Empire following the 1902 Peace of Vereeniging, ending the existence of the republic and any U.S. diplomatic representation to it.

evidence.quote: The 1902 Peace of Vereeniging, which ended the Boer War, annexed the Orange Free State to the British Empire.
